content.text:
Done — I opened the ProductOverview layout area for Northwind/Analytics. Please set the year toolbar to 2024 and apply the supplier filter for "Ma Maison" in that view to see the full product list.

Would you like me to:
- Automatically export that filtered product list for Ma Maison (2024) as a CSV, or
- Drill into the product details (prices, units in stock, and recent sales) in the UI?
